description: You can execute these commands from the CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook.

outputs.description: The IP address. IPinfo.IP.Hostname The IP hostname.
outputs.name: IPinfo.IP.Address

outputs.description: The IP ASN. IPinfo.IP.ASOwner The IP AS owner.
outputs.name: IPinfo.IP.ASN

outputs.description: The IP organization name (Only available in some IPinfo.io plans). IPinfo.IP.Organization.Type The IP organization type (Only available in some IPinfo.io plans).
outputs.name: IPinfo.IP.Organization.Name

outputs.description: The IP geographic location (coordinates as lat:lon). IPinfo.IP.Geo.Country The IP country.
outputs.name: IPinfo.IP.Geo.Location

outputs.description: The IP location as <City, Region, Postal Code, Country>. IPinfo.IP.Registrar.Abuse.Address The physical address registered for receiving abuse reports for the IP. (Only available in some IPinfo.io plans).
outputs.name: IPinfo.IP.Geo.Description

outputs.description: The country where abuse reports are received for the IP. (Only available in some IPinfo.io plans). IPinfo.IP.Registrar.Abuse.Email The email address for abuse reports provided by the IP. (Only available in some IPinfo.io plans).
outputs.name: IPinfo.IP.Registrar.Abuse.Country

outputs.description: The name of the abuse report handler received for the IP. (Only available in some IPinfo.io plans). IPinfo.IP.Registrar.Abuse.Network The IP range relevant for abuse inquiries provided for the IP. (Only available in some IPinfo.io plans).
outputs.name: IPinfo.IP.Registrar.Abuse.Name

outputs.description: The IP address. IP.Hostname The IP hostname.
outputs.name: IP.Address

outputs.description: The IP ASN. IP.Tags Tags related the IP use (hosting, proxy, tor, vpn).
outputs.name: IP.ASN

outputs.description: Names of indicators associated with the IP. IP.FeedRelatedIndicators.type Types of indicators associated with the IP.
outputs.name: IP.FeedRelatedIndicators.value

outputs.description: The source of the relationship. IP.Relationships.EntityB The destination of the relationship.
outputs.name: IP.Relationships.EntityA

outputs.description: The name of the relationship. IP.Relationships.EntityAType The type of the source of the relationship.
outputs.name: IP.Relationships.Relationship

outputs.description: The type of the destination of the relationship. IP.Geo.Location The IP geographic location (coordinates as lat:lon)
outputs.name: IP.Relationships.EntityBType

outputs.description: The IP country. IP.Geo.Description The IP location as <City, Region, Postal Code, Country>.
outputs.name: IP.Geo.Country

outputs.description: The organization of the IP. IP.Organization.Type The organization type of the IP.
outputs.name: IP.Organization.Name

outputs.description: The indicator that was tested. DBotScore.Score The actual score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: How reliable the score is (for example, "C - fairly reliable"). DBotScore.Type The indicator type.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Reliability

outputs.description: The vendor used to calculate the score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor
